name: 1'6"x2'6" Printed Rug Black - Threshold™
description:
Keep your entryway tidy with this Printed Rug from Threshold™. Made from coir-like material, this medium-pile rug helps keep your home clean by scraping away dirt and mud from shoes right at your doorstep. Featuring the phrase "Happy Home" in black on a brown background, this rectangular accent rug lends a warm and welcoming feel to your outdoor spaces, from your front doorstep to your back deck.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
